description:
List of names and monetary contributions received by the Rambam Synagogue congregation in Cairo (ק׳׳ק הרמבם). Dated 5603 AM which is 1842/1843 CE. The heading states "קאימת בייאן מט׳׳ (מטלוב?) ק׳׳ק הרמבם זל טרפ מדכורין שנת ٥٦٠٣" = "List specifying (funds) req[uired?] for the Q[ahal] Q[adosh] ha-Rambam, z''l, from those mentioned (below) in the year of 5603 AM." The list of contributors mentions sixty-nine names: 

(recto) Mordūkh Bialobos, Ḥayyīm Moṣeri, Ḥabīb Ḥasūn/Ḥasōn, Salmūn Simḥōn, Ḥayyīm Bialobos, Nissim Dayyan, Yaṣ' (יצ׳) Gabbay, Nissim Ḥanān, Ḥayyīm Ḥanān, Av[raham] Benyamīn, Nissim Raḍwān, Saʿad Wahba, ʿAṭiya Wahba, Moshe ha-Levi, Moshe Jūnayd, David Kohen, Ḥayyīm Pesaḥ, Yaṣ' (יצ׳) Dayyan, Yosef Moṣeri, Yaqūtī Ben-Yadaʿ, Yosef ha-Levi, Mordūkh Jūnayd, Shalom al-Qaṭawī, ʿEzra Hardī(?) (הרדי), Yaʿīsh Argīl, Sheḥata Jawhar, Eliyahu ha-Levi ʿAsāl, Av[raham] Abū-ʿAsāl, Av[raham] Wahba al-Zayyit, Sulaymān Wahba, Shaʾul al-Gāzī, Yosef Feleḥ(?) (פלח) in-law of Ḥabīb Ḥasūn/Ḥasōn, Saʿad Wahba (repeat) in-law of Abū ʿAsāl, Bekhor Dayyan, Shumāl(!) (Shemuʾel?) [.].ayyan, Avraham al-Rūbī, Bekhor Galico, David Dimayo, Ḥayyīm Goren, Ḥayyīm Menashe, Yom Ṭov Shalom, Yaʿīsh ha-Levi ʿAqūbaṣ, Yaʿ (יע׳) ha-Levi גיי(?) b. Av[raham], Nissim Zaghdūn, Moshe ha-Levi Feleḥ(?) (פלח), Ḥayyīm Wahba, Moshe ʿUrbī (עורבי), Maʿtūq Ḥaddād, Barūkh ʿAfīf, [Ni]ssim Malkhī, Yosef Ḥasūn/Ḥasōn, Salmūn Sūkhar, Yom Ṭov Moṣeri, Sulaymān Mnṭsh (מנטש), Av[raham] Malkhī, Ḥayyīm Ṣahal, Av[raham] Bshrī, Mikhaʾel Safriʾel, Av[raham] Ḥazaq, Yosef Kohen Ben-Shayʿa, Yehuda Palombo, Yaʿ[aqov?] Ashkenazī, Eliyahu ʿAkubas, Ḥayyīm Shalom, Moshe Moṣeri. 

(verso) mostly repeats except for: Eliyahu Khalwāl(?), David Kohen Rashidī, Av[raham] Maʿtūq, Av[raham] Kohen, Saʿad Zr..n(?). MCD.
description_he: רשימת שמות ותרומות כספיות שהתקבלו על ידי קהילת בית הכנסת הרמב"ם בקהיר. מתוארך ה'תר"ג (1842/43 לספירה). הרשימה מכילה 69 שמות תורמים. MCD.
